narrative:
Union East (precinct in Fayette County) has 420 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.7 percentage points.
